questions.question: What Asian city boasts the 9,000-room Imperial Palace, the world's largest?
What question ends the Ira Gershwin lines: 'I got rhythm / I got music / I got my man...'?
Who inspired Vanity Fair to ask: 'Is this the face that launched a thousand subpoenas'?
What spectacular use for glass did Roger Bacon first propose in his Opus majus?
Who was the only pitcher to lead the National League in strikeouts three times during the 1980s?
What company offered the first layaway plan for its $125 sewing machines, in 1856?
